    1. getFusionResult(Tower)

Interface Mergeable

All Known Implementing Classes:
GasTower, IceTower, RangeTower, ZapTower
public interface Mergeable
The Mergeable interface defines a contract for entities that can be combined to create a more advanced or specialized unit. * It is primarily used by Tower subclasses to facilitate the fusion mechanic, where two compatible units merge to produce a superior defensive structure based on predefined fusion recipes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Tower
    getFusionResult(Tower other)
    Determines and returns the resulting tower produced by merging this entity with another compatible unit.

  • Method Details

    • getFusionResult

      Tower getFusionResult(Tower other)
      Determines and returns the resulting tower produced by merging this entity with another compatible unit.
      Parameters:
      other - The secondary Tower unit involved in the fusion process
      Returns:
      A new Tower instance representing the fusion result, or null if the units are not compatible for merging.
